steps.title: Translate the relationship
steps.content:
The phrase "$y$ is $72$ less than $x$" means take $x$ and subtract $72$:
$$y = x - 72$$

steps.title: Evaluate each choice
steps.content:
• Choice A: $y=x+72$ — this adds $72$, meaning $y$ would be $72$ more than $x$, not less. Eliminate.
  • Choice B: $y=\frac{1}{72}x$ — this divides $x$ by $72$, a multiplicative relationship, not a subtraction. Eliminate.
  • Choice C: $y=72x$ — this multiplies $x$ by $72$, not subtracts. Eliminate.
  • Choice D: $y=x-72$ — subtracts $72$ from $x$, matching "$72$ less than $x$".
That matches Choice D — $y=x-72$.
